rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports or visible variables
Use eq declarations for boolean range checks and guarantee labels for clarity
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;` and constants with `const name : type = value;`
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
